title: sedum villosum subsp. glandulosum
intro: Sedum villosum subsp. glandulosum, also known as the glandular-leaved sedum, is a subspecies of succulent plant in the Crassulaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sedum villosum subsp. glandulosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
